name: Raspberry Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 10 oz packages frozen raspberries and juice
1 can crushed pineapple with juice (2 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the packages of frozen raspberries out of the freezer and let them partially thaw.
2. Pour the boiling water over the Jello and stir until it dissolves.
3. Stir in the crushed pineapple with its juice.
4. Refrigerate until the mixture just starts to set around the edges.
5. Gently fold in the walnuts or pecans, diced bananas, and frozen raspberries with their juice.
